CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-08-2002 Continued To Jan-10-03 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing In Scd 218 On Nov.4,2002 At 9:00 Am
Off Calendar Nov-04-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on calendar this day for hearing on default prove-up. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patricia L. Van Steenberge. Roger T. Ritter, Esq. represented the plaintiff. Witnesses Louise Masako Heckert and Thomas Cervantez were sworn and examined. The following exhibits were marked for identification and moved into evidence: 1) I.D. client/matter billing; 2) Billing Summary and copies of bills; 3) Business Information Report - l page. Good cause appearing, the Court grants judgment as follows: Principal: $24,
